prompt: Create a hyper-realistic surreal luxury fashion magazine cover portrait. Extreme close-up of a woman's open mouth filling the entire vertical frame, with glossy deep burgundy red lipstick, wet specular highlights, visible skin texture, and dramatic studio lighting. The upper teeth wear exactly 9 visible gold-and-diamond grillz caps: 2 partial side caps at the far left and far right edges, 4 rounded pavé diamond caps, 2 rectangular baguette-diamond caps, and 1 large central rounded pavé cap, all outlined in polished yellow gold with bright gem sparkle. Inside the dark open mouth, place a full-body miniature man in a navy blue suit, white shirt, black tie, and black leather gloves crouching forward as if emerging from the mouth, one gloved hand resting on the glossy lower lip, cinematic scale contrast, shadowy black background inside the mouth. Use an editorial high-fashion look with ultra-sharp macro detail, rich contrast, photoreal skin and lipstick texture, luxurious jewelry reflections, and a surreal advertising aesthetic. Add large white masthead text across the top reading LUXE, with smaller spaced text beneath the left side reading "MAGAZINE" and tiny text near the upper right reading SUMMER 2024. The masthead should overlap the lips slightly like a real magazine cover. Vertical 4:5 cover composition, centered symmetry, no extra cover lines, no watermark.
